title: coronilla globosa
intro: Coronilla globosa, also known as the crown vetch or coronilla, is a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coronilla globosa include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to help manage cardiovascular disease and diabetes. Coronilla globosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also available in capsule or tablet form as a dietary supplement.
